LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_ENTRANCE_EXAM.title: Entrance Exam
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_ENTRANCE_EXAM.descript: At the start of each combat, [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_ENTRANCE_EXAM.flavor: Finally, I have become a first-year student of Hasunosora Girls' High!
During your turn, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] once per real-time minute.
Transcend the limited time and bloom with all your might.
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.d: If your [gold]❤️[/gold] have not reached half the Max ❤️ at the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.f: Once upon a time, there were four little rabbits……
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_BUNNY_EARS.title: Bunny Ears
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_BUNNY_EARS.description: For every [blue]10[/blue] [gold]❤️[/gold] overflowed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_SHOPPING_MALL.title: Shopping Mall
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_SHOPPING_MALL.descript: All enemies drop an extra card reward. At the end of each combat, lose {Gold:inverseDiff()} Gold.
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_SHOPPING_MALL.flavor: Wow, they actually built such a huge shopping mall!
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_CAP_LIBERATOR.title: Cap Liberator
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_CAP_LIBERATOR.descript: Upon pickup, remove every pair of identical [gold]Unupgraded[/gold] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. For each removed pair, add one [gold]Upgraded[/gold] copy to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_CAP_LIBERATOR.flavor: So, what's the plan? What kind of dream do you want to keep dreaming here?
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_LINKURA_SYSTEM.title: Linkura System
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_LINKURA_SYSTEM.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain {LINKURA_MOD_AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_LINKURA_SYSTEM.flavor: A system that allows all school idols to bloom!
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_DREAM_DEFINE.title: DREAM_Define
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_DREAM_DEFINE.descripti: At the start of each combat, gain {LINKURA_MOD_AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_RELIC_DREAM_DEFINE.flavor:
Welcome, visitor.
Have a pleasant journey to Elysion.
